final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing concept art for a medieval fantasy dragon lair scene, suitable for game development.

Style/medium: photorealistic game concept art, Dungeons & Dragons classic fantasy aesthetic, epic cinematic rendering
Composition: wide establishing shot from low angle looking up at the dragon, the massive ancient dragon dominates the frame with wings spread wide, the treasure hoard occupies lower third, cave entrance visible in distant background
Subject: colossal ancient dragon with deep crimson and black interwoven scales, wings unfurled covering half the cavern space, eyes emitting intense golden glow, body coiled atop mountain of gold coins and artifacts
Scene/backdrop: active volcano lava cave interior deep underground, molten lava flowing down cave walls, treasure hoard containing exotic magical artifacts, ancient armors, and glowing magical gems
Lighting/mood: warm orange-red lava light illuminating the dragon scales creating complex interplay of light and shadow, cool moonlight streaming from distant cave entrance creating warm-cold color contrast, dramatic and epic atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson as dragon base, orange-gold for lava light and treasure highlights, black for shadows and scale accents, cool blue-white moonlight as counterpoint
Materials/textures: iridescent dragon scales with metallic sheen, rough volcanic rock surfaces, molten lava with liquid glow, polished gold coins and gems, weathered ancient armor
Avoid: cartoonish or stylized rendering, plastic-looking scales, deformed dragon anatomy, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
